name: pesaranlab
description: Pesaran Lab internal Claude Code plugins — BrainSight and imaging tooling.

plugins.name: brainsight-tools
plugins.description: Tools for working with BrainSight .bsproj neuronavigation projects on macOS. Includes relink-bsproj, which re-points a project's external file references (STL / MRI / CT / atlas) at the copies present on the current Mac — fixing bookmarks left pointing at another user's home dir or a different Dropbox install.
